---
title: Environment
description: MANIC_PUBLIC_ prefix, getEnv, getPublicEnv, and server-side env access.
---

# Environment API

Runtime helpers live in **`manicjs/env`**. They complement build-time injection documented under **[Environment variables](/docs/framework/advanced/environment-variables)**.

---

## Functions

<Cards>
  <Card title="getEnv" description="Single key — public prefix enforced in browser" href="/docs/api/env/get-env" />
  <Card title="getPublicEnv" description="All MANIC_PUBLIC_* keys as an object" href="/docs/api/env/get-public-env" />
</Cards>

```ts
import { getEnv, getPublicEnv } from 'manicjs/env';
```

---

## Server-side access

On the server, prefer **`process.env`** directly for secrets:

```ts
const databaseUrl = process.env.DATABASE_URL;
```

---

## Environment files

Common layout:

| File | Scope |
| :--- | :--- |
| **`.env`** | Defaults |
| **`.env.local`** | Machine-specific (gitignored) |
| **`.env.development`** / **`.env.production`** | Mode overrides |

---

## Best practices

<Callout type="warn">

Only **`MANIC_PUBLIC_*`** belongs in browser bundles. Never expose database credentials or API tokens client-side.

</Callout>

---
